name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: I’m shaking my head
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Bulk discounts for baby body parts?

The more I learn about Planned Parenthood's racket, aborting unborn children and then selling off their organs, the more my head spins.

This cannot be tolerated. It's up to you and me to ensure my colleagues in Congress take action -- NOW. No one else will do it for us.

**[So won't you please sign your"Stand for Life: Defund Planned Parenthood" Petition immediately](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29107709:27944373461:m:1:879035888:05E11A9E9F992B1C192E4344A5C55FBB:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, yesterday it was revealed that one of the vendors that sells body parts for Planned Parenthood once offered "bulk discounts" for aborted baby body parts.

In their advertisements, they even bragged their body parts were "fresh."

"Fresh" baby body parts, Fellow Conservative. This callous disrespect for human life sickens me.

That's why it's time to DEFUND Planned Parenthood immediately!

Since Congress holds the power of the purse, this is one measure Congress can take now -- even with President Obama in the White House.

And I believe a victory here will translate into even bigger victories for pro-lifers as Members of Congress who choose to vote to keep funding Planned Parenthood will pay a severe political price in 2016, paving the way for a pro-life President to sign pro-life legislation into law.

If elected President, I will do everything I can to end abortion-on-demand in America.

That's my pledge to you, Fellow Conservative.

**[So please sign your"Stand for Life: Defund Planned Parenthood" Petition immediately](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29107709:27944373461:m:1:879035888:05E11A9E9F992B1C192E4344A5C55FBB:r)**.

After you've signed your petition, I hope you'll please agree to chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away.

Your contribution will help me mobilize as many folks across the country as possible to ensure Congress takes action immediately to DEFUND Planned Parenthood!

Thank you in advance for your support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29107710:27944373461:m:1:879035888:05E11A9E9F992B1C192E4344A5C55FBB:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29107711:27944373461:m:1:879035888:05E11A9E9F992B1C192E4344A5C55FBB:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29107712:27944373461:m:1:879035888:05E11A9E9F992B1C192E4344A5C55FBB:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29107713:27944373461:m:1:879035888:05E11A9E9F992B1C192E4344A5C55FBB:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29107709:27944373461:m:1:879035888:05E11A9E9F992B1C192E4344A5C55FBB:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29107709:27944373461:m:1:879035888:05E11A9E9F992B1C192E4344A5C55FBB:r)

name: John Podesta, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: One major difference between Democrats and Republicans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA**
body:
The difference between them and us. | Friend --

Yesterday, nearly every candidate running for president filed a quarterly report with the Federal Election Commission.

The difference between Democrats and Republicans is startling.

Nearly 80 percent of all Republican money is going straight to outside groups like super PACs with no donation limits and very few rules. And on the Democratic side, it's the exact opposite: 80 percent of the money is going straight to the campaigns, where we can be careful and responsible stewards of our resources.

These are two fundamentally different ways of running for office. By putting their money into super PACs and outside groups, Republicans have empowered millionaires and billionaires to run the show with dark money.

We're empowering you. This is your campaign. Our supporters -- whether you show it with your time or your contribution -- are the ones driving this organization forward.

**With all the reports out there, we now know what we could be up against. Donate $1 or more and help run this campaign the right way:**

**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjMwNjQzNjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxNTUwMzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thanks,

John

John Podesta
Chair
Hillary for America

| | **PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA**
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just reply to this email with feedback -- we read everything, promise! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMwNjQzNjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxNTUwMzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMwNjQzNjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxNTUwMzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMwNjQzNjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxNTUwMzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjMwNjQzNjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxNTUwMzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjMwNjQzNjYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxNTUwMzYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Mark Campbell
subject: Ted Cruz wants to defund Planned Parenthood -- do you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cruz for President
body:
| | | | | Email not displaying correctly? [View it](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyw-2BbnaC6WIsdqAHO01HbsUbliT8AXmaobwEZw1WoyqUSMJ-2Bn5LW-2FYB-2F8K-2Fzm1wYXXQmd6-2B2pTBrcjvZctNVF-2FTlGkcNWCBYr1l4Qg4wX64y95cmt8eR9yAhsxZWVSI7ng28QU7R63pAsFQRDCKtZHwJgdPWiwSNSk9xsVhRiVGMANSA0O-2BQ8-2B-2B7nx4L6fzdk7L5QWxxZvheG3NDQ-2FvzE-2BKRlOT-2F8-2FaVRmEeKfFvxg9MTPHoaAbj-2FeNtoY1isazOzBcOFNgwZfphHpDRXt64UnCpX-2FcK4UslLy6WyTf5fygmZ_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHG5sLlGUSjtRAMOGkghIgfGXUJTXQVtcugE8ix8gYrdLCuXMjUz4s1Y88tkROjBE8bVB9F-2Fjx-2FYo9x6F9EvXqkinBZJctVWrkZQIsFP2Yk4Pdg38ZcYP8j8QrU1j1W6BsLRcXGWVLupXDMOBejIO-2B-2FMD3EmngdKGg5mkKu6vdvbpwC0GLcV-2FwxC8ucLrpvoHuqrbBBy3CWB4hVmHVfrCkqmalx8ByaTP6vPXqoxgrLBoxdHAmJ4pjHe24ls8-2B0YH8ZI3FstaaoOwRBB8FQGkgK6Ji-2BbVFikZ6i55qfCDO1AK47w2EXo1wYnHsAD6aaszEP53-2FwYpp4fk6Ld-2BUuygWCwH3JImcmOs9WJCAQlsdm-2BIKiw75jd5V8dC92tlEAd9c-3D) in your browser
---
---
|
---
---
| Dear Friend,

By now, I'm sure you've seen the shocking and sickening news that Planned Parenthood may be selling the body parts of aborted babies. Ted has come out strong calling for an investigation and for Planned Parenthood to be fully defunded.

He [spoke about it on the Kelly File](http://em.tedcruz.org/wf/click?upn=oxRiKmNZf-2B-2FjHRySYBDLyx-2FfYGqyCM1A1cRZnLoHNvBy-2Fkfzv6Qy44aKdjIQJpQIDF2JAe74xcbN-2FdkJN9Y-2BJA-3D-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCHG5sLlGUSjtRAMOGkghIgfN0Sv6T67Y8sDnwWVvpXZiWKLVm2zopyiTJV7We8VR3Vw3obzYuG-2F583W9K9Dkecu-2F85MjDy5d8n2LO9HjDMGbBiWKaSJnPik1G0uhF4ofIZ98AKhtJYS4oyv6M8owMtCDrhwzy6BZyBV-2Bxnn-2BRmzgbgx4hMaut55QQ-2FZI4RMJmzi2vc0y0l55Ouw0EtdLRhKaqa5aD2xeony0l0FsfTIc0P7T9F1a7E1mU04IyZkxXmGWAwSaFlVCPsBu-2FmCxF2P-2B-2FknItQpycKSfy193fxY0cGrJFap30Og1HPK7k0dHYk92ybnejb9oEkuKSaI9l-2FNBaV7xBhvS3epy76s1shDSSgvX99yTAy0LU-2F7ImOk8j8-3D) last night:
---
---

subject: Join Dr. Carson in D.C.

body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29114831:27953239099:m:1:876315805:BD949B243A6816C221E4B640E85F417D:r)
---
|
Please join Dr. Ben Carson as he gives the keynote address at the DC GOP 2016 Presidential Straw Poll on Monday from 6:00 PM to 10:00 PM.

This exclusive event will take place at the historic Wonder Bread Factory conveniently located a half block from the Shaw-Howard University Metro (641 S ST NW). Please support the DC Republican Party with the purchase of a General Admission Ticket ($50), VIP Ticket ($250) or a Table Sponsorship ($1000). Tickets are limited, please click here to purchase:www.strawpoll.dcgop.com.

When: Monday July 20, 2015, from 6:00 PM to 10:00 PM
Where: Wonder Bread Factory, 641 S ST NW, Washington, DC

Please join Dr. Carson and make your voice heard by voting in the straw poll! Together we can Heal, Inspire and Revive our nation.
---

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Remarkable news
body:
#
I have some exciting news, team.
**More people have contributed to our campaign than to any other candidate running for president, Democrat or Republican.**
That is truly remarkable, and I am humbled by this support. **But I will be frank: it may not matter in the end unless we get organized _now._**
On the evening of July 29, we will kick off building the organization that will take back our country from the billionaire class -- and I'm going to speak directly by video to this unprecedented gathering.
People will gather at more than 1,000 homes, restaurants, and other locations across the country for our first ever national organizing meeting, including this event close to you:
**Wednesday, July 29th at 7:00 pm EDT**
**MoCo for Bernie Sanders 2016**
2021 Hickory Hill Lane
Silver Spring, MD 20906
More about this event:
https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/detail/4jvkf
But there are many, many more events happening all over. [**Find other events happening near you, and RSVP to join us for this historic night.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb204b/43f17890/5c4ba22b/621d775e/3077215/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBb1ZXNXJibTkzYmlrbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/search_results?orderby=zip_radius&zip_radius%5b0%5d=20902&zip_radius%5b1%5d=50&country=US&radius_unit=mi")
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb204b/43f17890/5c4ba22b/621d775e/3077215/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBb1ZXNXJibTkzYmlrbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/search_results?orderby=zip_radius&zip_radius%5b0%5d=20902&zip_radius%5b1%5d=50&country=US&radius_unit=mi")
At our organizing meetings, you'll have the opportunity to meet other supporters in your area, talk about why you support our campaign, and then tune in to a live broadcast where we will discuss how we take the next step together to build the organization that will change our country.
What we are building together is both unprecedented and critically important to our future. While other candidates may have more money, we have already proven that we have more people -- now let's show them what happens when the people unite.
[**Find and join an organizing meeting for our campaign on July 29.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb204b/43f17890/5c4ba22b/621d775e/3077215/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZhU1ZBb1ZXNXJibTkzYmlrbEpRPT0iOiIyMDkwMiJ9/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/event/search_results?orderby=zip_radius&zip_radius%5b0%5d=20902&zip_radius%5b1%5d=50&country=US&radius_unit=mi")
Thank you.
Bernie Sanders

** **

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb204b/43f17890/5c4ba22b/621d775f/3077215/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb204b/43f17890/5c4ba22b/621d775c/3077215/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb204b/43f17890/5c4ba22b/621d775d/3077215/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb204b/43f17890/5c4ba22b/621d775a/3077215/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

On the evening of July 29, we will kick off building the organization that will take back our country from the billionaire class -- and I'm going to speak directly by video to this unprecedented gathering. People will gather at more than 1,000 homes, restaurants, and other locations across the country for our first ever national organizing meeting, including this event close to you: Wednesday, July 29th at 7:00 pm EDT MoCo for Bernie Sanders 2016 2021 Hickory Hill Lane Silver Spring, MD 20906 More about this event: But there are many, many more events happening all over. name: Team Marco
subject: First GOP Debate: Be There
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,

In three weeks, Marco will be in Cleveland, Ohio for the first
Republican presidential primary debate on FOX News. And we have
some exciting news -- you could be too!

Click here to donate $5 and be entered into our first debate
contest. This is truly a unique opportunity to witness the
historic presidential debate on August 6 and support Marco in
person.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42985528:18123275691:m:3:1349778030:0085044DF732A841B72A5257AB0DC31F:r

Good luck!

Team Marco

P.S. Platinum Level Members of Team Marco are automatically
entered into all of our contests. Click here to join today.
http://email.vervemail.com/ct/42985529:18123275691:m:3:1349778030:0085044DF732A841B72A5257AB0DC31F:r

Cleveland Debate Contest Rules

Contest ends July 26, 2015.
Limit one entry per individual
Make a contribution and also enter
You can also enter here without making a
contribution.
See full terms & conditions below.

NO PURCHASE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN A
PRIZE. No contribution or payment of any kind is necessary to
enter or win this Promotion. Making a contribution does not
increase your chances of winning. To enter by making a
contribution, click here. To enter without making a contribution,
click here. Void where prohibited. The Promotion begins on July
16, 2015 at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Daylight Time and ends on July 26,
2015 at 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time ("Entry Period"). All
entries must be received by 11:59pm Eastern Daylight Time on
Sunday, July 26, 2015. One (1) winner will receive the following
Prize: two (2) tickets to the Republican Presidential Primary
Debate in Cleveland, OH on August 6, 2015; roundtrip airfare for
the winner and a guest; hotel accommodations for winner and guest
. Odds of winning depend on the number of entries received. The
Promotion is open to citizens and permanent residents (green card
holders) of the United States and are at least 18 years of age or
the age of majority as determined by state law. Prize not
redeemable for cash. Details and qualifications for participation
in this Promotion may apply. The Sponsor is Marco Rubio for
President, PO Box 558701, Miami, Florida, 33255.

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
